title: ERCOT Reported Outages CSV download
description:
Report generation outages in ERCOT.

MW values of planned and forced generation outages, including energy storage
resources, currently taking place as well as any that occurred during the previous
6 days. These quantities include full outages, as well as partial reductions in
generation capability that meet reporting requirements. The values
reflect MW capability reductions relative to a generator's maximum seasonal
capability.

Includes
- Dispatchable outages
- Renewable outages
- Combined outages
